title: festuca ovina f. firmula
intro: Festuca ovina f. firmula, also known as sheep's fescue, is a type of grass that belongs to the Poaceae family. This plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include antiseptic, anti-inflammatory, and antispasmodic effects. The health benefits of Festuca ovina f. firmula include its ability to soothe digestive issues, relieve respiratory problems, and alleviate pain. The herbal preparations of this plant can be found in teas, infusions, and tinctures, often used to treat a range of ailments.
